background: Suppose that $X_1, X_2, \ldots, X_n$ are independent random variable, each with the uniform distribution on $[c-d, c+d]$ where $c$ and $d$ are both unknown $(-\infty<c<\infty, d>0)$.

task.query: Find the maximum likelihood estimators of $c$ and $d$.

Given the following failure time data: $20,23,25,26,28,29,31,33,34$, and 35 days. Assuming that the data follow a uniform distribution on [$c -d, c+d$], use the maximum likelihood method to obtain the unknown parameters, $c$ and $d$, of the uniform distribution.
